For getting over business problems. after yovr bath offer water to

Should you be facing problems at your working place due to
dwindling number of customers or any such problem, on any
Saturday cut to pieces S lemons and with them a handful of Sarson
(mus.tard seeds), 1 clove (lavanga) and some grains of black peppet
and keep them at your working place. Next day press all the material
betw.een your hands and throw them away. Do so for some days
to reap on amalingly positive result.
